title: provenance.output
description: Build provenance and supply-chain attestation information.

analyzer.description: Unique identifier for the Provenance analyzer.

repository.description: The image repository that was analyzed.

tag.description: The image tag that was analyzed.

has_provenance.description: True if SLSA provenance or build attestations were found.

has_cosign_signature.description: True if a Cosign signature was found.

source_tracked.description: True if the source repository URL is tracked in metadata.

indicators_count.description: Total number of supply-chain indicators found.

indicators.description: List of specific supply-chain evidence found (e.g., OCI labels, signatures).

key.description: The specific metadata key or ID.
